problem_text_cn:
4-6 如图4-4所示，在半顶角为$ \theta $的倒立固定圆锥面光滑内壁上，一小球在距锥顶$ h_{0} $高度处作水平圆周运动。
(1) 试求圆运动速率$ v_{0} $；
(2) 若在某时刻，小球的速度不改变方向地从$ v_{0} $增为$ \sqrt{1+\alpha} v_{0} $，其中$ \alpha>0 $，小球随即离开原轨道但不会离开锥面内壁，试问小球是否会在距离锥顶某个$ h $高度处作水平圆周运动？
(3) 接(2)问，小球若不再作圆周运动，试求运动过程中相对锥顶能达到的最大高度$ h_{\max} $和最低高度$ h_{\min} $。
problem_text_en:
4-6 As shown in Figure 4-4, a small ball performs uniform circular motion on the smooth inner wall of a vertical fixed conical surface with a semi‑vertical angle $ \theta $. The ball is at height $ h_{0} $ from the apex of the cone.
(1) Find the speed $ v_{0} $ of the circular motion.
(2) Suppose that at a certain moment, the speed of the ball increases from $ v_{0} $ to $ \sqrt{1+\alpha} v_{0} $ (where $ \alpha>0 $) without changing its direction. The ball then leaves the original circular orbit but remains on the inner wall of the cone. Will the ball again perform a horizontal circular motion at some height $ h $ from the apex?
(3) Following (2), if the ball no longer moves in a circular path, determine the maximum height $ h_{\max} $ and the minimum height $ h_{\min} $ that the ball can reach relative to the apex during its motion.
problem_solution_cn:
解 (1) $v_{0}$对应的向心力由重力$mg$和锥面法向支持力$N$合成，据此可解得
$$ v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}. $$
(2) 质量记为$m$的小球，在沿锥面运动过程中机械能守恒。若在$h$高处小球不再爬高或爬低，速度记为$v_{f}$，则有
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv_{f}^{2}+mgh=\frac{1}{2}m(1+\alpha)v_{0}^{2}+mgh_{0}. \quad \text{(①)} $$
小球所受重力$mg$和锥面支持力$N$之和相对锥顶力矩的竖直分量为零，故小球相对锥顶角动量的竖直分量守恒。若在$h$高度处小球不再爬高或爬低，则有
$$ mv_{f}h\tan\phi=m\sqrt{1+\alpha}v_{0}h_{0}\tan\phi. \quad \text{(②)} $$
如果此时小球恰好作圆周运动，那么又需要满足类似$v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}$的下述关系式
$$ v_{f}=\sqrt{gh}. \quad \text{(③)} $$
将$v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}$代入后，上述①②③式可化简
$$ v_{f}^{2}+2gh=(3+\alpha)gh_{0}, $$
$$ v_{f}h=\sqrt{1+\alpha}g\sqrt{gh_{0}}, $$
$$ v_{f}=\sqrt{gh}. $$
再将④代入⑤和⑥式，可得
$$ h=\left(1+\frac{\alpha}{3}\right)h_{0},\quad h^{3}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}. $$
要求
$$ \alpha=0\quad\text{或}\quad\alpha=-8. $$
这与题给$ \alpha>0 $矛盾，故$h$无解。
(3) 割去(2)问解答中④式，由④和⑤式消去$v_{f}$，推得可得
$$ 2h^{2}+(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}=(3+\alpha)h_{0}h, $$
$$ 2h^{2}-2h^{2}h_{0}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}h-(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}, $$
$$ 2h^{2}(h-h_{0})=(1+\alpha)h_{0}(h+h_{0})(h-h_{0}), $$
可分解为
$$ 2h^{2}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}(h+h_{0}),\quad h=h_{0}, $$
三个根分别为
$$ h_{1}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1-\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}<0\quad(\text{舍去}), $$
$$ h_{2}=h_{0}, $$
$$ h_{3}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1+\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}>h_{0}. $$
故
$$ h_{\max}=h_{3}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1+\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}>h_{0}, $$
$$ h_{\min}=h_{0}. $$
(关于$h_{\max}$与$h_{0}$的大小关系，可这样考虑：若使$h_{\max}>h_{0}$，则$\alpha$需取何值？可见$\alpha$取任何正值，均可使$h_{\max}>h_{0}$。)
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) The centripetal force corresponding to $v_{0}$ is provided by the vector sum of gravity $mg$ and the normal supporting force $N$ from the cone. This yields
$$ v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}. $$
(2) The ball, of mass $m$, conserves mechanical energy while moving along the cone. If at height $h$ the ball no longer climbs or descends, let its speed be $v_{f}$. Then
$$ \frac{1}{2}mv_{f}^{2}+mgh=\frac{1}{2}m(1+\alpha)v_{0}^{2}+mgh_{0}. \quad \text{(①)} $$
The vertical component of the torque of the forces $mg$ and $N$ about the apex is zero, so the vertical component of the ball’s angular momentum relative to the apex is conserved. If at height $h$ the ball no longer climbs or descends, we have
$$ mv_{f}h\tan\phi=m\sqrt{1+\alpha}v_{0}h_{0}\tan\phi. \quad \text{(②)} $$
If the ball were to execute exactly circular motion at that moment, it would also have to satisfy a relation analogous to $v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}$, i.e.
$$ v_{f}=\sqrt{gh}. \quad \text{(③)} $$
Substituting $v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}$, equations ①②③ simplify to
$$ v_{f}^{2}+2gh=(3+\alpha)gh_{0}, $$
$$ v_{f}h=\sqrt{1+\alpha}g\sqrt{gh_{0}}, $$
$$ v_{f}=\sqrt{gh}. $$
Inserting ④ into ⑤ and ⑥ gives
$$ h=\left(1+\frac{\alpha}{3}\right)h_{0},\quad h^{3}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}. $$
This requires
$$ \alpha=0\quad\text{or}\quad\alpha=-8. $$
Both contradict the condition $\alpha>0$; hence no such $h$ exists.
(3) Discarding equation ④ from the solution of (2) and eliminating $v_{f}$ from ④ and ⑤ leads to
$$ 2h^{2}+(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}=(3+\alpha)h_{0}h, $$
$$ 2h^{2}-2h^{2}h_{0}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}h-(1+\alpha)h_{0}^{2}, $$
$$ 2h^{2}(h-h_{0})=(1+\alpha)h_{0}(h+h_{0})(h-h_{0}), $$
which factorises as
$$ 2h^{2}=(1+\alpha)h_{0}(h+h_{0}),\quad h=h_{0}. $$
The three roots are
$$ h_{1}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1-\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}<0\quad(\text{discarded}), $$
$$ h_{2}=h_{0}, $$
$$ h_{3}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1+\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}>h_{0}. $$
Therefore,
$$ h_{\max}=h_{3}=\frac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1+\sqrt{1+\frac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}>h_{0}, $$
$$ h_{\min}=h_{0}. $$
(Regarding the relation between $h_{\max}$ and $h_{0}$, note that for any positive $\alpha$, $h_{\max}>h_{0}$ holds.)
img_cn: 图4-4：一个倒立的固定圆锥面，其半顶角为$\theta$，内壁光滑。一个小球在距锥顶高度$h_0$处作水平圆周运动。图中展示了圆锥的几何形状、小球位置、以及小球运动轨迹。
解题过程图：展示了小球在圆锥面上运动的受力分析、机械能守恒、角动量守恒等物理原理的应用，以及相关的公式推导和代数运算过程。
img_en: Figure 4-4: A vertical fixed conical surface with semi‑vertical angle $\theta$ and a smooth inner wall. A small ball performs uniform circular motion at height $h_0$ from the apex. The figure shows the geometry of the cone, the position of the ball, and the ball’s trajectory.

Solution‑process diagram: Illustrates the application of physical principles such as force analysis, conservation of mechanical energy, and conservation of angular momentum to the motion of the ball on the cone, together with related formula derivations and algebraic manipulations.
problem_answer:
(1) $v_{0}=\sqrt{gh_{0}}$。
(2) 小球不会在另一高度处作圆周运动。
(3) $h_{\max}= \dfrac{1+\alpha}{4}\left[1+\sqrt{1+\dfrac{8}{1+\alpha}}\right]h_{0}>h_{0}$，$h_{\min}=h_{0}$。
